nasb.text: and the lampstands, five on the right side and five on the left, in front of the inner sanctuary, of pure gold; and the flowers and the lamps and the tongs, of gold;

esv.text: the lampstands of pure gold, five on the south side and five on the north, before the inner sanctuary; the flowers, the lamps, and the tongs, of gold;

cnv.text: 內殿前面的精金燈臺，右邊五行，左邊五行；還有金花、金燈盞，

ccb.text: 至圣所前面的纯金灯台，左右各五个；灯台上的金花、灯盏和蜡剪；
